item.title: The Unbelievable Noise of Battle
item.description: Experience the intense and overwhelming sounds of combat. Veterans describe the chaos, explosions, and constant noise that define life on the battlefield.

media:content.media:title: The Unbelievable Noise of Battle
media:content.media:description: Experience the intense and overwhelming sounds of combat. Veterans describe the chaos, explosions, and constant noise that define life on the battlefield.

item.title: Remembering Jesse Brown & Thomas Hudner
item.description: Honoring the bravery of Jesse Brown, the first African American Naval Aviator, and his wingman Thomas Hudner during the Korean War. A story of courage, sacrifice, and Medal of Honor heroism.

media:content.media:title: Remembering Jesse Brown & Thomas Hudner
media:content.media:description: Honoring the bravery of Jesse Brown, the first African American Naval Aviator, and his wingman Thomas Hudner during the Korean War. A story of courage, sacrifice, and Medal of Honor heroism.

item.title: No Engines, No Power—Just Sky
item.description: A thrilling moment of gliding without engines. Experience the tension and skill required to navigate the skies relying solely on natural lift and piloting ability.

media:content.media:title: No Engines, No Power—Just Sky
media:content.media:description: A thrilling moment of gliding without engines. Experience the tension and skill required to navigate the skies relying solely on natural lift and piloting ability.

item.title: Hand-to-Hand Combat in the Korean Hills
item.description: A firsthand account of intense hand-to-hand combat during the Korean War. Experience the bravery, strategy, and raw realities faced by soldiers on the hills.

media:content.media:title: Hand-to-Hand Combat in the Korean Hills
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of intense hand-to-hand combat during the Korean War. Experience the bravery, strategy, and raw realities faced by soldiers on the hills.

item.title: Our Silly Grenade Mistake in Combat
item.description: A humorous yet intense story from combat involving grenades. Learn what went wrong, the lessons learned, and how quick thinking prevented disaster.

media:content.media:title: Our Silly Grenade Mistake in Combat
media:content.media:description: A humorous yet intense story from combat involving grenades. Learn what went wrong, the lessons learned, and how quick thinking prevented disaster.

item.title: Jack Ruby Found Guilty in Oswald Shooting
item.description: On this day in 1964, Jack Ruby was convicted for killing Lee Harvey Oswald. The trial marked the first televised U.S. courtroom verdict, a historic moment in American history.

media:content.media:title: Jack Ruby Found Guilty in Oswald Shooting
media:content.media:description: On this day in 1964, Jack Ruby was convicted for killing Lee Harvey Oswald. The trial marked the first televised U.S. courtroom verdict, a historic moment in American history.

item.title: The Hardest Day of My Life
item.description: A veteran recounts the most challenging day of their life. Personal stories of struggle, resilience, and the moments that tested courage and determination.

media:content.media:title: The Hardest Day of My Life
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts the most challenging day of their life. Personal stories of struggle, resilience, and the moments that tested courage and determination.

item.title: From Vietnam Battlefield to Olympic Stage
item.description: Follow the inspiring journey from serving in Vietnam to competing in the Olympics. A story of resilience, dedication, and achieving extraordinary goals.

media:content.media:title: From Vietnam Battlefield to Olympic Stage
media:content.media:description: Follow the inspiring journey from serving in Vietnam to competing in the Olympics. A story of resilience, dedication, and achieving extraordinary goals.

item.title: WWII Pilot Reveals the True Flight Story
item.description: A WWII combat pilot shares firsthand accounts of a historic flight. Discover the challenges, decisions, and experiences that defined the mission in detail.

media:content.media:title: WWII Pilot Reveals the True Flight Story
media:content.media:description: A WWII combat pilot shares firsthand accounts of a historic flight. Discover the challenges, decisions, and experiences that defined the mission in detail.
